_comment: Copy this file to journals-config.json and edit for your field. The .json version is gitignored. journal_sweeps include EVERY paper from the listed journals; pubmed_searches use keyword filters and run against the same date window. keyword_tiers drive the lightweight pre-filter (full LLM scoring runs separately via score-with-claude.js).

pubmed_searches.label: Example: exclude livestock contamination
pubmed_searches.term: "your-topic"[tiab] NOT (cattle[tiab] OR bovine[tiab] OR poultry[tiab] OR aquaculture[tiab])

_keyword_tier_notes: Keywords drive the pre-filter score before LLM scoring. Prefix a keyword with '~' for word-boundary matching (use this for 2-4 letter abbreviations that would false-match — e.g. '~klb' avoids matching 'klbacterium'). Long-form phrases use simple substring includes().
